name: c123-live-mini
description: Minimalistic live results solution for C123 timing ecosystem

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c yellow,blue,green "npm run build -w @c123-live-mini/shared -- --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "npm run dev -w @c123-live-mini/server" "npm run dev -w @c123-live-mini/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @c123-live-mini/shared && npm run build -w @c123-live-mini/server && npm run build -w @c123-live-mini/client

//overrides: Rationale: vitest@4 depends on vite@8. In a hoisted npm workspaces tree,
vite@8 ends up at the root node_modules and @vitejs/plugin-react resolves
direct-imports rolldown, whose per-platform native binding is an optional
dep that npm#4828 silently skips on Railway's linux-x64 Nixpacks builder,
so the client `vite build` crashes at config load time.
Forcing vite to ~7.1.9 across the whole tree eliminates vite@8 (and
transitively rolldown) entirely, so both the build and the vitest runner
See DEVLOG.md entry 2026-04-10 for the full debugging session and
Safe to remove when ANY of the following becomes true:
(a) vitest no longer hard-depends on a vite major that uses rolldown
(c) the project migrates to pnpm, which doesn't have this bug
